loop1.title: Context Rail Header (Overview / Section / Feeder)
loop1.note: Showing PCC-1A feeder context; some members (UPS-05, UPS-06, Solar Incomers, Transformers) are dark (no data) and honest-blank their slots.

loop1.title: Real Time Monitoring (Feeder Heatmap)
loop1.note: Showing real-time power distribution for active feeders (UPS, BPDB, Solar Incomers). HHF Reactive feeders are blank as no matching members were found in the panel topology. Load % is omitted as no rated_kva is available for the GIC-* meters.

loop1.title: Total Feeder Consumption / Supply
loop1.note: Showing total active power — per-phase power isn't measured for this asset; denominator (contracted capacity) is unknown for this asset.

loop1.title: Consumption Trend / Supply Trend
loop1.note: Showing total active power — per-phase power isn't measured for this asset; Power Factor uses kpi_true_pf (unsigned) to avoid reverse-CT sign inversion.

loop1.title: Quick Stats
loop1.note: Showing per-phase voltage, current unbalance, and total current for the 6 active outgoing feeders; 2 feeders (UPS-05, UPS-06) are dark and honest-blanked.
